recap:
- The Databricks Agent Framework supports advanced features for sophisticated agent implementations, including custom inputs and outputs.
- Custom inputs allow additional parameters (e.g., `client_type`, `session_id`) that are not part of standard messages, accessible via `request.custom_inputs`.
- Custom outputs can include extra data not involved in the conversation flow.
- The Agent Evaluation review app does not support rendering traces for agents with custom input fields.
- AI agents utilize retrievers for unstructured data, with Databricks providing support for retriever tracing and evaluation.
- Benefits of retriever integration include automatic source document links and relevance evaluation in the AI Playground UI.
- Custom retriever schemas can be defined using `mlflow.models.set_retriever_schema` to ensure compatibility with MLflow.
